holdings.infoBox: SNSR is an equity ETF with a total of 72 individual holdings. The top holdings are STMicroelectronics stock at 10.84%, Lattice Semiconductor at 6.29%, Rambus at 4.77%, DexCom at 4.75%, and Garmin at 4.48%.

overview.description: The Global X Internet of Things ETF (SNSR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index composed of developed market companies that facilitate the Internet of Things industry. SNSR was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Indxx Global Internet of Things Thematic Index
